Name: Average time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants where both activities occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 in the variant containing the longest sequence of reviewer assignment attempts
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision, considering only cases where SW-Reviewer Agreed follows Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total elapsed time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and SW-Reviewer Declined in traces where no agreement occurs after the reminder
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Average duration of the interval starting with Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and ending with the next occurrence of SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to SW-Reviewer No Response in variants where reviewer engagement fails entirely
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Average time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and the subsequent Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1, indicating cyclical re-invitation patterns
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Total time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in cases that eventually reach editorial assessment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Minimum time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and SW-EIC Major Revision in successful review trajectories that include at least one reviewer agreement after the reminder
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Average time it takes for the process to progress from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to Manuscript Export Succeeded in variants that ultimately lead to acceptance
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Elapsed time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and Assign a Different Editor in traces involving editor reassignment following persistent reviewer non-response
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'Assign a Different Editor'

Name: Time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late, capturing delay propagation after second reminders
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late'

Name: Average time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and Unassign Reviewer in cases where assigned reviewers are later removed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'Unassign Reviewer'

Name: Total time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion in rare backward-flow instances (if any), to assess process anomalies
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'
